entities.name: V
entities.context: Person to seek approval from for major changes or drift from plan

entities.name: Build in chunks, validate continuously
entities.context: Core development principle for phased implementation with validation

entities.name: Small batches
entities.context: Principle of testing after each component

entities.name: Fail fast
entities.context: Principle of catching errors early in the process

entities.name: Document as you go
entities.context: Principle of concurrent documentation rather than deferring to end

entities.name: SESSION_STATE
entities.context: State tracking mechanism to be updated every 3-5 steps

entities.name: PRD
entities.context: Product Requirements Document used for approval and execution guidance

entities.name: P33
entities.context: Principle requiring tests to be written concurrently with code

entities.name: Scope creep
entities.context: Anti-pattern of expanding beyond approved PRD boundaries

entities.name: Quality Validation
entities.context: Verification process required before claiming completion

relationships.context: V approves PRD and must be consulted for major drift
Small batches is a sub-principle of chunked building
Fail fast supports the validate continuously approach
SESSION_STATE tracks progress through chunked execution
Rubric checking verifies alignment with approved PRD
P33 is one of the rubric items to verify
Quality validation is the final step of the chunked build process
